dct_title_s: Ducatus Brunsvicensis fereque Lunaeburgensis cum adiacentibus episcopatibus, comitatibus et dominatibus, etc : nova et locupletissima descriptio geographica
dct_description_sm: correcta, innovata, edita, authore Nicolae Ioannis Piscatore.
2 bar scales on map, given in "Miliaria Germanica" and "Horae itineris".
Decorative title cartouche with allegorical figure and coat of arms.
Dutch on bar scales, in addition to Latin.
